live_status_gate.detail: inferBaseStatus() requires hasPrice=true AND Binance source with delayMinutes !== null. BINANCE/BINANCE-WS with null delayMinutes returns 'delayed', never 'live'. Live downgrades to delayed at 5min. Verified by logic simulation.

label_centralization.detail: data-status.ts canonical 6-value DataStatus (live/delayed/ayc_data/no_data/insufficient/demo). mapLegacyStatus() maps old API values (fallback→delayed, no_volume→insufficient, license_required→insufficient, api_error→no_data). All components use getStatusLabel/getStatusColor from data-status.ts.

price_display_consistency.detail: AssetDetailModal headerStatus uses mapLegacyStatus(analysis.dataQuality.status) || (livePrice ? 'delayed' : 'no_data') — no longer claims live on price arrival without TTL. Dashboard dataStatus uses getStatusLabel() from data-status.ts. MarketTicker uses getStatusLabel(). market page uses buildDataStatusMeta.
price_display_consistency.note: Dashboard freshPriceCount threshold (45s) retained for multi-asset aggregate; label output now from central getStatusLabel().

analysis_gating.detail: hasSufficientData gates target/stop/RR in AssetDetailModal. Now uses mappedQualityStatus (post-mapLegacyStatus) to catch both 'insufficient' and 'no_data' from legacy API values.

dashboard_causal_truth.detail: Causal query now gated on btcLiveFresh (nowTs - btcEntry.ts < 60000 AND price > 0). Fake values removed: ||80000 price fallback, volume_ratio:2.1, indicators:{rsi:62,macd_hist:0.0012}. Query disabled when BTC price not fresh. UI shows 'Causal analiz için güvenilir veri yok.' when not fresh.

alarm_truth.empty_state: explicit empty state rendered when alarms.length === 0

performance_zero_state.detail: No gold bar when stats.total===0. Gold segment only when stats.pending>0.

social_radar_percentages.qa_finding: INCORRECT — bull+bear exceeded 100 in 351/1610 combinations (max sum=126)
social_radar_percentages.fix_detail: proportional scaling when bull+bear>100; all 1610 combinations verified to sum to 100

mobile_safe_area_css.detail: env(safe-area-inset-top) applied to .app-ticker with box-sizing:content-box. viewport-fit:cover and black-translucent already set. Real device verification not done.

ticker_duplicates.double_render_note: intentional for seamless CSS scroll animation

browser_mobile_smoke.reason: Playwright Chromium download blocked by network restrictions in sandbox

production.reason: No live domain accessible from this environment

test_results.deselected_reason: fastapi not in sandbox; pass in CI Ubuntu runner

Dashboard/ticker live threshold differs from buildDataStatusMeta — labels now from getStatusLabel()
AssetDetailModal headerStatus assigns live on price arrival without TTL check — now uses 'delayed'
CI not run on HEAD (dade011) — awaiting GitHub Actions
Production NOT_RUN — no live domain access
Dashboard causal query sent fake price ||80000, volume_ratio:2.1, rsi:62, macd_hist:0.0012
EMPTY_ALARM_HINT demo row shown when no alarms — replaced with true empty state
